Mentions Timeline (7 articles)
3310-01-11
Zemina Torval Returns to the Senate
Senator Zemina Torval returns to the Imperial Senate after several months' absence, transferring ownership of Torval Mining Ltd to her daughter Constantia and positioning herself as a potential successor to Chancellor Blaine.
3301-04-21
Torval Apologises for Synteini Slave Snafu
The Imperial Slavers Association's planned sale of 5 million discounted Imperial Slaves at Lagerkvist Gateway was delayed when Princess Arissa's agents seized the shipment in LTT 9810 as part of their investigation. Senator Zemina Torval was reportedly furious but later apologised, acknowledging the investigators acted with the Emperor's best interests at heart. A fresh shipment is now being prepared for sale at Lagerkvist Gateway.
3301-04-17
Synteini Slave Sale Honours Emperor
The 'Great Slaver Showdown' between Zemina Torval and Aisling Duval concluded with Torval's victory. The Imperial Slavers Association provided for 2,387,567 non-citizens compared to Aisling's Angels freeing 1,149,756 slaves. In honour of Emperor Hengist Duval, Torval authorised the sale of 5 million Imperial Slaves at 20% off regular retail price at Lagerkvist Gateway in Synteini.
3301-04-01
Aisling's Angels Challenge the Senator's Slavers
Senator Zemina Torval accepted a challenge from Aisling Duval to determine whose position on slavery the Empire's citizens truly support. Torval and the Imperial Society will buy unregulated slaves at Lagerkvist Gateway in Synteini, while Aisling Duval, Stop Slavery Stupid and the Empire Party will accept donations of Imperial Slaves at Mackenzie Relay in Cemiess with the intention of freeing them. If Aisling wins, Torval will free slaves brought to her training centres; if Torval wins, Aisling must take on personal Imperial Slaves for one year.
3301-03-08
Anti Slavery Support Grows in Synteini System
3301-03-05
Torval Handles the Help in Synteini
3301-03-01
Unregulated Slaves Sought in Synteini
